name: public_transportation_whistleblower_redwood_st_lt
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Public Transportation, the situation tagged internally around public transportation whistleblower redwood st lt has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Zara Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Zara Ibrahim, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Transportation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Diallo
agents.identity: I am Keisha Diallo, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Transportation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if short term advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for long term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Zara Ibrahim must choose under short term versus long term. What does Zara Ibrahim do?
